title: clerodendrum fuscum
intro: Clerodendrum fuscum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Yellow Balm' due to its medicinal properties and fragrance. This plant has been traditionally used for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clerodendrum fuscum include relieving pain, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, Clerodendrum fuscum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of essential oils or tinctures.
